#init
microprogram[0] = 000000000_100_000110101_000000100_001_0001 	# PC = PC + 1; MBR = RAM[PC]; JMPC

#PUSH addr
microprogram[2] = 000000011_000_000110101_000000100_001_0001	# PC = PC + 1; MBR = RAM[PC]
microprogram[3] = 000000100_000_000010100_000000001_100_0010	# MAR = MBR; MDR = RAM[MAR]
microprogram[4] = 000000110_000_000010100_100000000_000_0111	# H = TOS
microprogram[5] = 000000111_000_000010100_001000000_000_0000	# TOS = MDR
microprogram[6] = 000001000_000_000110101_000001001_000_0100	# SP = SP + 1; MAR = SP
microprogram[7] = 000000000_000_000011000_000000010_010_1111	# MDR = H; RAM[MAR] = MDR

#ADD
microprogram[8] = 000001001_000_000010100_000000001_100_0100	# MAR = SP; MDR = RAM[MAR]
microprogram[9] = 000001010_000_000010100_100000000_000_0010	# H = MDR;
microprogram[10] = 000001011_000_000111100_100000000_000_0111	# H = H + TOS;
microprogram[11] = 000001100_000_000010100_000000010_000_0111	# MDR = TOS;
microprogram[12] = 000001101_000_000110101_000001001_010_0100     # SP = SP + 1; MAR = SP; RAM[MAR] = MDR
microprogram[13] = 000000000_000_000011000_001000000_000_1111	# TOS = H; GOTO 0

#SUB
microprogram[14] = 000001001_000_000010100_000000001_100_0100	# MAR = SP; MDR = RAM[MAR]
microprogram[15] = 000001010_000_000010100_100000000_000_0010	# H = MDR;
microprogram[16] = 000001011_000_000111111_100000000_000_0111	# H = TOS - H;
microprogram[17] = 000001100_000_000010100_000000010_000_0111	# MDR = TOS;
microprogram[18] = 000001101_000_000110101_000001001_010_0100     # SP = SP + 1; MAR = SP; RAM[MAR] = MDR
microprogram[19] = 000000000_000_000011000_001000000_000_1111	# TOS = H; GOTO 0

#MUL
microprogram[20] = 000001001_000_000010100_000000001_100_0100	# MAR = SP; MDR = RAM[MAR]
microprogram[21] = 000001010_000_000010100_100000000_000_0010	# H = MDR;
microprogram[22] = 000001011_000_001011100_100000000_000_0111	# H = H * TOS;
microprogram[23] = 000001100_000_000010100_000000010_000_0111	# MDR = TOS;
microprogram[24] = 000001101_000_000110101_000001001_010_0100     # SP = SP + 1; MAR = SP; RAM[MAR] = MDR
microprogram[25] = 000000000_000_000011000_001000000_000_1111	# TOS = H; GOTO 0
